stage_name: Inventory Runtime and Material Burden Foundations
identity_status: STRONG ALIGNMENT - Phantom economy has been materialized as strategic burden.

Deep audit trail via InventoryTransaction transcripts
major_risks: Hard Cap Cliff (lack of intermediate strategic friction before 100%)

Text-only mental tracking burden for large inventories
balance_questions: Does a flat 40-capacity limit provide enough tension?
Should HIGH/FULL bands increase DEFEAT_DROP risk?
Should items have variable capacity costs?
required_followups: Implement Durability Decay logic in combat
Integrate capacity pressure into combat resolution biasing
